name: 3. MyLoanSense
description:
Affiliate Link: https://www.myloansense.com/c/darlene-franklin

Widget:
<div id="loansense-widget"></div>
<script>(function (w, d) {
    if (w.LoanSenseWidget) { console.error('LoanSenseWidget already included'); return; }
    var elt = d.createElement('script'); elt.type = "text/javascript"; elt.defer = true;
    elt.addEventListener('load', load);
    elt.src = "https://tools.myloansense.com/index.js";
    var b = d.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];
    b.parentNode.insertBefore(elt, b);
    function load() {
      w.LoanSenseWidget.init("RKK8WSGVEPMBSFPC7DFYNFTKP1CV", {
      partnerCode: "Darlene-Franklin",
      organization: "Mission Mortgage Colorado, Inc",
      lenderEmail: "darlene@missionmortgageco.com",
      nmls: "undefined",
     
    });
      elt.removeEventListener('load', load);
    }
  })(window, document);
</script>
